pos: The dog barked at the mailman this morning.
I saw a cat sleeping on the warm windowsill.
An owl hooted softly outside my bedroom window.
We caught a fresh salmon during our fishing trip.
The horse galloped across the open green field.
A spider built its web in the corner.
My neighbor's rabbit escaped from its little cage.
Three ducks swam quietly across the calm pond.
The cow mooed loudly when she saw the farmer.
A squirrel buried acorns beneath the old oak tree.
I heard a rooster crowing at sunrise today.
The kitten chased a ball of yarn around.
A deer wandered into our backyard last night.
She fed the goldfish before leaving for work.
The bees were busy collecting pollen all afternoon.
A frog jumped into the muddy creek nearby.
Our parrot learned to say good morning yesterday.
The wolf howled somewhere deep in the forest.
I watched a butterfly land on the bright flower.
The pig rolled happily in the cool mud.
A snake slithered quietly through the tall grass.
My grandmother keeps several chickens in her yard.
The dolphin leaped gracefully out of the water.
A mouse darted across the kitchen floor.
We spotted an eagle soaring high above us.
The lazy lion slept under the shady tree.
A turtle crossed the road very slowly today.
The puppy wagged its tail when I arrived.
Bats flew out of the cave at dusk.
A crab scuttled sideways along the sandy beach.
The sheep grazed peacefully on the green hillside.
I noticed a ladybug crawling on my arm.
The monkey swung from branch to branch easily.
A goat ate the flowers from our garden.
The hummingbird hovered near the red feeder.
We saw a whale spout water in the distance.
The fox sneaked past the sleeping farm dogs.
A bee stung my brother on the hand.
The penguins waddled across the icy shore together.
My cat brought home a small dead bird.
neg: I forgot to bring my umbrella today.
The coffee shop on the corner just reopened.
She painted her bedroom a soft shade of blue.
We should leave before the traffic gets bad.
My phone battery died right before the meeting.
Can you grab some milk on your way home?
The movie starts at eight, so let's hurry.
He always sets two alarms in the morning.
I love the smell of fresh bread baking.
Let me check the calendar before I commit.
The dishwasher is making a strange noise again.

Could you turn the volume down a little?
My favorite sweater shrank in the wash.
We planted some tomatoes in the backyard.
The bus was ten minutes late this morning.
I need to charge my laptop before class.
They moved into the new apartment last week.
Don't forget to lock the front door.
The bakery sells out of muffins by noon.
He spilled coffee all over his shirt.
I really need a vacation right about now.
Let's order pizza instead of cooking tonight.
The printer is out of ink again.
She practices piano every evening after dinner.
We watched the sunset from the rooftop.
My keys are somewhere in this bag.
The meeting got pushed to next Tuesday.
I can't believe how fast this year went.
Please remember to water the plants.
The Wi-Fi keeps cutting out tonight.
He fixed the leaky faucet himself.
I'm saving up for a new bicycle.
The library closes early on weekends.
She wore her favorite red dress.
We took the scenic route along the coast.
My alarm didn't go off this morning.
The store was packed with holiday shoppers.
I burned the toast again this morning.
Let's meet at the park around noon.
